name: Self-Update Fix

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Self-Update Fix is complete and correct

scope: Hide or fix the selfupdate stub so users are not misled into thinking they are current. Either implement real GitHub releases checking or change the message to clearly say self-update is not available yet. See cmd/update or similar entry point.
success_criteria: Running 'wolfcastle update' with the stub updater produces honest messaging that self-update is not yet available, in both human and JSON output modes
system/base/ regeneration continues to work as before
All tests pass with coverage above 90%

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: honest-stub (leaf, 3 tasks). The work is a single cohesive change: update the stub to stop lying, update the command to surface the truth, update the tests to match. No sub-orchestrators needed since all three tasks touch one concern. Task ordering: stub behavior first (task-0001), then command output (task-0002), then tests (task-0003).
